data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: When code-reviewer sub-agent is dispatched without WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR exported, get_artifacts_dir() hashes REPO_ROOT from git rev-parse in sub-agent CWD, which differs from worktree CWD, causing reviewer-findings.json to land in wrong /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ directory. Fix: update COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md and REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 dispatch instructions to explicitly instruct passing WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR=<WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS> in all reviewer sub-agent prompts when in worktree context. Testing_mode: GREEN (documentation fix, no code change needed).
